brand: Trend Hotels and Suites by My Place

grant_and_term.grant: Franchise to operate a Business within Protected Area. Rights are personal, non-transferable except per Section 17. Cannot subfranchise or sublicense.
grant_and_term.initial_term: 10 years from date Business begins operating as System franchise
grant_and_term.early_termination: At year 5 with 180 days' notice if in Good Standing, no penalty/liquidated damages
grant_and_term.extension: 5-year option if in Good Standing, 180 days' notice, must comply with then-current System Standards, PA adjusted at franchisor's sole discretion
grant_and_term.non_renewable: FA states it is non-renewable with no rights of license renewal — the 5-year option is an 'extension'

fee_and_payment_obligations.royalty: 0% (30 days) → 2.5% (31-90) → 4% (91-180) → 5% (thereafter) of GRR. Never decreases. Acquisitions pay 5% immediately.
fee_and_payment_obligations.loyalty_fee: 1% of GRR monthly (changeable on 120 days' notice)
fee_and_payment_obligations.revenue_intelligence_fee: 1% of GRR monthly (changeable on 120 days' notice)
fee_and_payment_obligations.renewal_fee: Then-current Application Fee + Initial Franchise Fee
fee_and_payment_obligations.no_accord_or_satisfaction: Payments applied to earliest unpaid obligations. No restrictive endorsements accepted.
fee_and_payment_obligations.no_withholding: Cannot withhold any payment for any reason including alleged franchisor breach

site_selection_and_construction.site_approval: Franchisor must approve site before franchise sale. No time limit for approval/rejection.
site_selection_and_construction.conversion_to_system_standards: Franchisee must convert and furnish property per System Standards
site_selection_and_construction.construction_plan_review: Franchisor reviews plans for architectural appearance, not for engineering adequacy or code compliance
site_selection_and_construction.permits: Franchisee responsible for all permits and code compliance

training_and_operational_obligations.mandatory_training: Resource Evaluation & Guidance Program (58 hrs), GM Training (48 hrs), Administrative Training (12 hrs)
training_and_operational_obligations.training_must_complete_before_opening: REG Program must be completed before opening
training_and_operational_obligations.new_gm_training: Must complete GM Training within 90 days of hire
training_and_operational_obligations.retraining: May be required at $4,125 per occurrence
training_and_operational_obligations.system_standards_compliance: Must comply with all System Standards; franchisor can change standards at discretion

termination_triggers_and_cure.curable_defaults: 30 days to cure (or longer if required by law). Only defaults NOT listed in Section 8(A) are curable.
non_curable_defaults: 3 notices of material default in 24 months
Failure to operate per FA/System Standards
General assignment for benefit of creditors
Failure to operate for 5 consecutive days
termination_triggers_and_cure.bankruptcy_termination: Provided for but may not be enforceable under federal bankruptcy law

conditions: All sums owed to franchisor paid
Release or statement of claims signed
Current agreement signed by new franchisee
transfer_restrictions.franchisor_purchase_option: Cash sale: match the offer. Non-cash: buy at appraised value. 30 days to decide.

default_and_cross_default.cross_default: Uncured default in underlying mortgage, lease, or other indenture is a non-curable default

noncompete_scope_and_duration.during_term: No involvement in competing business in Protected Area without written authorization

guaranty_scope.scope: Unconditional guaranty of prompt payment of all fees and performance of all personal obligations
guaranty_scope.waiver_for_unmarried: If no spouse signature, guarantor represents they are unmarried or franchisor has waived
guaranty_scope.jurisdiction: State and Federal Courts of South Dakota

liquidated_damages.pre_approval_operation: $1,000 per day hotel is open prior to written approval
premature_termination: If open < 36 months: 36 × average monthly fees (Sections 4(B),(C),(K),(L))
If open ≥ 36 months: 36 × average monthly fees for past 36 months
If < 36 months remaining: remaining months × average monthly fees
liquidated_damages.post_termination_mark_use: Liquidated damages for use of Marks after termination date
liquidated_damages.post_termination_obligations: Must perform within 7 days of effective termination date

venue_and_dispute_resolution.arbitration: Franchisor may require arbitration in Aberdeen, SD
venue_and_dispute_resolution.governing_law: South Dakota (unless state law requires otherwise)

insurance_requirements.amounts_changeable: At any time per System Standards

indemnification.scope: Claims for losses and damages related to operation of Business

force_majeure.context: Washington addendum: if force majeure prevents franchisor from curing a material default, cure period extended until event ceases

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.clause: Early termination at year 5 without penalty
distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.significance: Unusual — gives franchisee an exit option mid-term without liquidated damages

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.clause: Franchise Agreement explicitly stated as non-renewable
distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.significance: Extension option exists but is not technically a renewal. May limit franchisee expectations.

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.clause: My Place Hotels may be franchised within Trend Protected Area
distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.significance: Franchisor's competing brand can directly compete in your exclusive territory

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.clause: Marketing fund shared across brands (Trend + My Place)
distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.significance: Trend franchisees contribute to a fund that benefits a larger, established brand with no proportional allocation guarantee

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.clause: No withholding of payments even for alleged franchisor breach
distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.significance: Even if franchisor materially defaults, franchisee cannot offset fees owed

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.clause: Washington addendum adds franchisee termination right for material franchisor default (90-day cure)
distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.significance: Only available in Washington — no similar right in base franchise agreement
